summary: Squash Sprint final QA — frontend only. Tested 7 scenarios across desktop+mobile. PASS rate ~95%. (1) TrustBar mobile placeholders verified — 9 animate-pulse skeleton divs render before stats load, then animated counters appear with real data; no layout jump. (2) /terms route renders correctly — h1 'Условия использования' in Cormorant Garamond serif, all 7 numbered sections found (01-07: Платформа, Бронирование, Escrow, Отмена, Персональные данные, Запрещённый контент, Изменения), mailto:legal@gostaylo.com + /help links present. (3) Footer link to '/terms' works (no longer /help#terms). (4) Web Share — [data-testid='card-share-button'] present on every card (7 buttons); navigator.share called correctly with title/text/url payload; clipboard fallback also works (window.__copied populated, toast 'Link copied'/'Ссылка скопирована' shown). (5) i18n /listings RU: 'Результаты поиска', 'Что?', 'Куда?' (input placeholder), 'Даты', 'Фильтры', 'Показать карту', 'ИИ' badge (NOT 'Smart'), '1 гостей', 'patong' badge — all clean. Favorite click without auth toasts 'Войдите, чтобы добавить в избранное' correctly. (6) i18n /listings EN: 'Search Results', 'What?', 'Filters', 'Show map', 'Smart', 'Property', '3 guests', 'patong' — all clean, no RU leakage. (7) Smoke regression: home loads, EmptyState renders on impossible-filters URL, /about + /help unaffected, mobile FAB still present.

ui_bugs.issue: aria-label is hardcoded English 'Add to favorites' even when language=ru. Title/aria-label should be localized (e.g. 'Добавить в избранное'). The Share button correctly localizes its aria/title to 'Поделиться'.
The back-arrow <a href='/'> has NO aria-label and NO title attribute. Spec expected 'На главную' / 'Back to Home' label. Adds an a11y/i18n gap.
Renders '1 гостей' instead of '1 гость'. Russian plural rules: 1 → гость, 2-4 → гостя, 5+ → гостей.

action_items: LOW: Localize aria-label on the Heart/Favorite button on listing cards (currently hardcoded 'Add to favorites' in all languages). The Share2 button correctly switches to 'Поделиться' in RU — replicate that pattern.
LOW: Add aria-label and/or visible/sr-only text 'На главную' / 'Back to Home' to the back-arrow <a href='/'> at top of /listings (mobile header).
LOW: Apply Russian plural rules to the guest count label so '1 гостей' becomes '1 гость' (use a small pluralization helper or Intl.PluralRules with ru → one/few/many).
INFO: All 4 Squash Sprint deliverables verified working as designed — TrustBar placeholders, /terms route + footer link, Web Share + clipboard fallback, /listings i18n. No critical regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: useShareListing.js — clean implementation. Correctly handles AbortError silently, falls through to clipboard on other share failures, language-aware toast messages via getUIText. Good UX.

TrustBar.jsx — replaced opacity-0 placeholder with animate-pulse rounded bar (h-6 w-16 mobile, h-7 w-20 sm). Skeleton bar component (TrustBarSkeleton) shown while loadingStats=true, then per-counter placeholder shown before IntersectionObserver fires (visible=false). No layout jump on mobile observed. rootMargin '0px 0px 200px 0px' is sufficient for 390x844 viewport.
/app/app/terms/page.js — well-structured: 7 numbered sections with Serif headers, mailto + /help CTAs. Page title set correctly to 'Условия использования | Platform'.
Heart aria-label not localized — minor i18n leak. Back-arrow link missing aria-label is an a11y issue (screen readers will read it as just 'link to home page' generic).
Cookies/localStorage language switching works correctly across pages — verified RU↔EN switching with localStorage.setItem('gostaylo_language', ...) + reload.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all 4 sprint deliverables verified; 3 minor i18n/a11y nits found)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded /listings data (7 cards including 'Финальный тест - Вилла Premium', 'Honda PCX 160', 'Beachfront Paradise Villa - Rawai', 'Luxury Yacht - Andaman Dream', etc.).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Squash Sprint scope (TrustBar placeholders, /terms route, footer link to /terms, Web Share, /listings i18n) all verified working. 3 minor unrelated nits remain: (1) Heart button aria-label not i18n'd, (2) /listings back-arrow has no aria-label, (3) Russian plural form for '1 гостей'. None are blockers. /listings now has 7 real cards rendering. localStorage key for language is 'gostaylo_language' (values: ru/en/zh/ko). Web Share button data-testid='card-share-button' is present on EVERY card (left of the heart). Mobile viewport for testing: 390x844; for /listings header i18n testing, use empty filters URL (http://localhost:3000/listings) so 'Что?'/'What?'/'Куда?'/'Where?' placeholders appear (with category= or where= URL params they get replaced by selected values).
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bugs. The earlier false-positive 'missing Что?/Куда?/What?' from initial test run was caused by URL params (?category=property&where=patong) replacing placeholders with selected values. Re-tested with empty-filters URL → placeholders present and correctly localized.
